title: lycium scoparium var. normale
intro: Lycium scoparium var. normale, commonly known as the New Mexico wolfberry or wolfberry bush, is a type of shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and vitamins, which contribute to its various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Lycium scoparium var. normale have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including diabetes, high blood pressure, and inflammation, and it is also believed to have anti-cancer and anti-aging properties. Lycium scoparium var. normale can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or supplement, with its herbal preparations often used to support eye health, immune function, and overall well-being.
